title: Prayer of Invocation to the Good Daimon (Agathos Daimon)
notes: Invocation to the Agathos Daimon (Good Daimon / Good Spirit), a central figure in Greek domestic religion and magical practice. The Agathos Daimon was traditionally honored with a libation of unmixed wine after meals. In the PGM, this figure is invoked for blessing, guidance, and protection.
